TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mananigay, title = Mananigay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mananigay} }

S.FORM: alang Mananigay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 114 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Mananigay ga Tudrivuan ru Laliavan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Mananigay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mananigay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mananigay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 34 buwan, 116 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 114 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 2 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Mananigay ga Tudrivuan ru Laliavan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Mananigay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Mananigay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mananiɣaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na mananiɣaj ɣa tu*ri*uan ru lalia*an. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ mananiɣaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ mananiɣaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
